title: Charger
drDigitalIntro:
The charger is your laptop's power cord.
• One end plugs into the wall outlet.
• The other end plugs into the side of your laptop.
• It fills up the battery.
drDigitalSuccess: That's your charger! Keep it nearby so your laptop never runs out of battery.
drDigitalHint: Take a look at your charger, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
